title: この星明かりをしるべにして

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road fails to get a spot in the Japan
Cup, and the next day, she doesn't show up to
class.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega decides she wants to go talk with
her and respectfully asks me to cancel training for
the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a clumsy attempt to make the most of their
skipping class, Admire Vega suggests they visit a
nice spot for some stargazing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There, Narita Top Road confesses that she might
have reached the end of her road.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Admire Vega, who once shunned outside
help, now reaches out herself, professing her
desire to run against Narita Top Road for who she
is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two make a promise under the starry sky to
compete against each other again.
